summary: Addresses all external review #2 feedback from berendt: adds missing RBAC ClusterRole rule for policy/poddisruptionbudgets (B-001), sets explicit Replicas in TestReconcileDeployment_PDBCreated (W-002), adds PDB error propagation test (I-001), and persists three review patterns learned from the feedback.

tests_checklist.item: All existing controller tests pass (go test ./operators/keystone/internal/controller/...)
All deployment helper tests pass (go test ./internal/common/deployment/...)
New error propagation test verifies PDB creation failure is surfaced
Edge cases covered: zero replicas, boundary replicas=2, single replica, replica change

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing ClusterRole YAML structure (comment with CC ID, apiGroups/resources/verbs)
Error propagation test follows established interceptor.Funcs pattern from reconcile_secrets_test.go
Imports are clean and necessary (fmt for Errorf, interceptor for Funcs)
No dead code or unnecessary changes

security_checklist.item: RBAC ClusterRole verbs match kubebuilder RBAC marker exactly (get;list;watch;create;update;patch;delete)
All 12 RBAC markers in keystone_controller.go have corresponding ClusterRole rules
No hardcoded secrets or sensitive data

architecture_checklist.item: ClusterRole rule placement follows existing ordering conventions
Changes are minimal and focused on feedback items only

fail_fast_checklist.item: PDB creation error propagates with descriptive message

defensive_checklist.item: Error test verifies both wrapper message and root cause in error chain

next_steps: W-001 follow-up: backport improved Ensure* patterns (owner ref reconciliation, DeepEqual guard, metadata merging) from EnsurePDB to EnsureDeployment and EnsureService in a separate PR
